story.iWant: to open specific threads, projects, and workflows via holokai:// links
story.soThat: I can navigate directly from external sources (browser, email, etc.)
story.tasks: - Register holokai:// protocol handler with OS - Create DeepLinkParser utility for URL parsing and validation - Create DeepLinkRouter service for route dispatching - Handle deep links when app is closed (cold-start) - Handle deep links when app is open (warm-start, focus window) - Add pending deep link handling (require auth before navigation) - Add deep link error handling (malformed URLs, invalid routes)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Links work from browser, email, and other applications (CORE §10.3)
Links work when app is closed (launch app and navigate) (CORE §10.3)
Links work when app is open (focus window and navigate) (CORE §10.4)
Malformed URLs handled gracefully (show error toast, log warning)
Authentication required before navigation (redirect to login if needed)

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Protocol URL parsing and routing. Inputs: holokai:// URLs. Outputs: Navigation actions. Owner: Main Process. Registers protocol, handles open-url and second-instance events.

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: interface DeepLinkRoute {type: 'thread'|'project'|'workflow'|'settings', params: Record<string, string>, queryParams?}. Supported URLs: holokai://thread/{id}, holokai://project/{id}, holokai://workflow/{id}, holokai://settings, holokai://settings/{section}.

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Create DeepLinkHandler, register holokai:// protocol (app.setAsDefaultProtocolClient), add to electron-builder config, create DeepLinkParser, create DeepLinkRouter, handle cold-start (open-url event, macOS) and warm-start (second-instance event, Windows/Linux), store pending URL if not authenticated.

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Deep link URL parsing: < 10ms. Route validation: < 20ms. Navigation dispatch: < 50ms from URL received to SPA route change. Cold-start navigation: < 2 seconds (launch app + navigate).

artifact.reason: NEW - Main process deep link handler, protocol registration, event listeners
NEW - URL parsing and validation (regex, extract route type and params)
NEW - Route dispatching (parsed route → SPA navigation)
Existing - needs pending URL storage for auth-required deep links

story-context.constraints: - **Desktop Implementation:** Electron main process. Protocol registration varies by platform (electron-builder handles this). - **Platform-Specific:** macOS uses 'open-url' event. Windows/Linux use 'second-instance' event (single-instance lock). - **URL Format:** holokai://route/id?params. Validate route type, sanitize params (prevent path traversal, XSS). - **Authentication:** Check authStore.isAuthenticated. If not authenticated, store pending URL, navigate to login. After login, process pending URL. - **Error Handling:** Malformed URLs → show error toast, log warning, don't crash. Invalid routes → show toast "Unknown route", fallback to home. - **Single Instance:** Use app.requestSingleInstanceLock() to prevent multiple app instances. Second launch sends URL to first instance, then exits.

interface.name: DeepLinkHandler.register()
interface.signature: register(): void - Calls app.setAsDefaultProtocolClient('holokai'), listens for open-url and second-instance events

interface.name: DeepLinkParser.parse()
interface.signature: parse(url: string): DeepLinkRoute | null - Validates URL format, extracts route type and params, returns null for malformed URLs

interface.name: DeepLinkRouter.route()
interface.signature: route(route: DeepLinkRoute): void - Dispatches to SPA navigation based on route type (thread, project, workflow, settings)

tests.standards: Use vitest for unit tests. Test URL parsing for all supported routes. Test invalid URL rejection (malformed, unknown routes). Test route dispatching (verify correct navigation calls). Test cold-start and warm-start scenarios. Test auth-required deep links (redirect to login, then navigate).

test.idea: Unit test: Parse all supported routes (project, workflow, settings), verify correct route type extracted
Unit test: parse('holokai://invalid') returns null, parse('invalid-url') returns null
Integration test: App closed, trigger 'open-url' event with holokai://thread/abc, verify app launches, navigates to thread
Integration test: App open, trigger 'second-instance' event with URL, verify window focused, navigates to route
Integration test: User not authenticated, deep link to holokai://thread/abc, verify redirected to login, URL stored as pending, after login navigates to thread
Integration test: Trigger deep link with malformed URL, verify error toast shown, app doesn't crash
